name: Dutch Meatloaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix meat, breadcrumbs, half of the tomato sauce, egg, salt, and pepper in a large bowl.
2. Shape the mixture into a loaf.
3. In a separate bowl, combine the remaining ingredients with the other half of the tomato sauce.
4. Pour the mixture over the meat loaf.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 75 minutes.
